h6.strong: How long does an escape room last?

div.p: Each experience lasts a total of about 75 minutes — 60 minutes of gameplay, plus a short briefing before and debrief after. You’ll have a full hour inside the room to solve puzzles, uncover secrets, and make your escape.

h6.strong: Do I need any special knowledge or skills to play?

div.p: Not at all! Escape rooms are designed for all types of thinkers — no trivia, math skills, or outside knowledge required. Just bring curiosity, communication, and a willingness to think outside the box.

h6.strong: Can we play with fewer players than the recommended minimum?

div.p: You can, but keep in mind that fewer players means more puzzles per person! If you’re up for the challenge, it’s totally doable — just know that some tasks might take longer or require extra cleverness with a smaller group.

Only some of them. Each room has a different atmosphere — from mysterious to intense to suspenseful. Specimen X, for example, leans into the horror vibe, while The Holmes Paradox is more Sherlock than scream-fest. Scare level is marked on each room page.

h6.strong: What happens if we don’t escape in time?

div.p: No worries — most groups don’t! Our game master will step in when your time’s up and walk you through the remaining puzzles. You’ll still have a blast, and most of the fun is in the experience itself, not just the escape.

h6.strong: Are your rooms suitable for kids or families?

div.p: Absolutely! We welcome players of all ages, though some rooms have minimum age suggestions due to complexity or themes. Curse of the Pharaoh is a great pick for families and younger players. Just check the age limit listed for each room.

xpath.attribute: appointment_type.assign_method == 'resource_time' and based_on_users and not skip_resource_selection
appointment_type.assign_method == 'resource_time' and not based_on_users and not skip_resource_selection

div.p:
We are a team of passionate people whose goal is to improve everyone's life through disruptive products. We build great products to solve your business problems.
Our products are designed for small to medium size companies willing to optimize their performance.

t.t-nocache: The number of products is dynamic, this rendering cannot be cached.

div.t-attf-class: s_text_block d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row gap-1 gap-lg-4 align-items-lg-center #{_div_class}

a.class: nav-link o_nav-link_secondary p-2 o_navlink_background_hover d-flex align-items-center h-100 text-reset

section.class: s_banner_connected o_cc o_cc5 parallax o_colored_level pb256 pt224

div.style: background-image: radial-gradient(circle farthest-side at 25% 25%, rgba(222, 222, 222, 0) 0%, rgb(69, 69, 69) 100%);

div.p: Step into the mystery. Each room is a whole new reality.

section.class: s_appointments s_dynamic s_dynamic_empty pt32 pb32 s_appointment_type_card o_colored_level o_cc o_cc5 bg-black
s_dynamic_snippet_title oe_unremovable oe_unmovable d-flex flex-column flex-md-row mb-lg-0 pb-3 pb-md-0 o_colored_level justify-content-between

p.strong: You’re Not Playing a Game. You’re Living a Story.

section.class: s_dynamic_snippet_content oe_unremovable oe_unmovable o_not_editable col o_colored_level

div.class: missing_option_warning alert alert-info fade show d-none d-print-none rounded-0

div.div: Your Dynamic Snippet will be displayed here... This message is displayed because you did not provide both a filter and a template to use.

section.class: s_dynamic_snippet_products oe_website_sale s_dynamic s_dynamic_empty pt32 pb32 o_colored_level s_product_product_horizontal_card o_cc o_cc1 bg-black
s_dynamic_snippet_title oe_unremovable oe_unmovable d-flex flex-column flex-md-row mb-lg-0 pb-3 pb-md-0 o_colored_level justify-content-between
s_dynamic_snippet_content oe_unremovable oe_unmovable o_not_editable col o_colored_level

div.class: missing_option_warning alert alert-info fade show d-none d-print-none rounded-0

div.div: Your Dynamic Snippet will be displayed here... This message is displayed because you did not provide both a filter and a template to use.

div.class: missing_option_warning alert alert-info rounded-0 fade show d-none d-print-none

div.div: An address must be specified for a map to be embedded

t.t-nocache: Each user is different regardless of the page visited.

i.class: fa fa-1x fa-fw fa-user me-2 o_editable_media

span.t-esc: user_id.name[:23] + '...' if user_id.name and len(user_id.name) > 25 else user_id.name

t.t-value: [sort for sort in website_sale_sortable if sort[0]==request.params.get('order', '')]

div.t-attf-class: oe_website_sale {{opt_wsale_fullwidth and 'container-fluid o_wsale_page_fluid' or 'o_wsale_page_contained container'}} {{layout_mode == 'list' and 'o_wsale_layout_list' or 'o_wsale_layout_catalog'}} {{opt_wsale_categories_top and 'o_wsale_has_filmstrip'}} {{opt_wsale_floating_bar and 'o_wsale_has_floating_bar'}} {{hasLeftColumn and 'o_wsale_has_sidebar'}} {{editionPreviews and 'o_wsale_edit_preview_enabled'}}

aside.class: d-none d-lg-block position-sticky align-self-start col clearfix

div.class: o_wsale_products_grid_before_rail vh-100 ms-n2 pt-2 px-lg-2 pb-lg-5 ps-2 overflow-y-scroll

div.t-att-class: 'products_categories' + (' accordion accordion-flush' if is_sidebar_collapsible else ' mb-3')

div.t-if: attrib_values or tags or ( show_price_filter and isFilteringByPrice )

t.t-valuef: {{is_sidebar_collapsible and 'accordion accordion-flush'}} {{is_sidebar_collapsible and (opt_wsale_categories or len(attributes) > 0) and 'border-top'}}

t.t-value: category or opt_wsale_categories_top or (not opt_wsale_floating_bar and (opt_wsale_attributes_top or is_view_active('website_sale.search') or is_view_active('website_sale.sort') or hasPricelistDropdown))

header.t-attf-class: d-flex flex-column gap-2 {{_header_has_content and 'py-3' or (not _header_has_content and not opt_wsale_design_grid and 'py-3')}}

t.t-valuef: d-none d-lg-flex w-100 p-0 mb-0 small

h1.t-attf-class: d-flex gap-1 align-items-center mb-0 lh-lg {{search and 'base-fs font-sans-serif' or 'fs-3'}} {{search and bool(category) and 'mb-2'}}

a.t-if: (search and not category) or (not search and category)
a.t-att-href: keep('%s/category/%s' % (shop_path, slug(category.parent_id))) if category.parent_id else keep(shop_path, search=0)

t.t: Drag building blocks here to customize the header for "" category.

div.class: products_header btn-toolbar flex-nowrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-1 gap-lg-2 gap-xl-3

div.t-attf-class: o_wsale_products_header_search_form_container {{ _has_all_sibligns and 'd-none d-sm-inline-block'}} col-xl-5 me-auto {{not hasLeftColumn and 'col-xl-6'}}

a.t-attf-class: btn o_not_editable {{_has_all_sibligns and 'd-inline-block d-sm-none' or 'd-none'}} me-auto btn-{{navClass}}
a.title: Search Products

button.t-attf-class: btn btn-{{navClass}} position-relative {{not wsale_has_filters_btn_lg and 'd-lg-none'}} {{not is_view_active('website_sale.search') and 'ms-auto'}} text-nowrap
button.title: Filters

small.t-attf-class: ms-1 {{(hasPricelistDropdown and is_view_active('website_sale.search') and is_view_active('website_sale.sort')) and 'd-none d-md-inline-block'}}

span.t-attf-class: position-absolute top-0 start-100 translate-middle border border-{{navClass}} rounded-circle bg-danger p-1

header.div: No results found for ''. Showing results for ''.

t.t-value: (not hasLeftColumn and ppr == 4) or (opt_wsale_fullwidth and ppr > 3)
grid_md_allow_custom_cols and ('g-col-md-' + str(col_width)) or grid_md_use_3col and 'g-col-md-4' or 'g-col-md-6'

t.p: No product defined in this category.

div.div: Click 'New' in the top-right corner to create your first product.

div.t-attf-class: products_pager d-flex justify-content-center {{opt_wsale_design_grid and 'py-4' or 'py-5 pb-4'}}

t.t: Drag building blocks here to customize the footer for "" category.

section.class: d-flex d-print-none align-items-center justify-content-lg-end flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4 mb-3

div.class: o_wappointment_card_location d-flex gap-1 fw-bold smaller text-muted text-break
o_wappointment_card_location d-flex gap-1 fw-bold smaller text-muted text-break
o_wappointment_card_location d-flex gap-1 fw-bold smaller text-muted text-break
